name: The Preservation Company
description_short: Sun River Health is a federally qualified health center (FQHC) providing primary care, dental, behavioral health, and specialty services across 50 locations in New York with sliding-scale fees for uninsured patients.
description_long:
Sun River Health is a community health organization that has operated for over 50 years across the Hudson Valley, New York City, and Long Island regions. The organization recently underwent a rebrand, consolidating HRHCare, Brightpoint Health, and HRHCare Urgent Care under the Sun River Health name. As a federally qualified health center, it operates as a nonprofit healthcare provider rather than a consumer finance company, delivering medical services to diverse populations regardless of insurance or payment ability.

Sun River Health offers comprehensive healthcare services including primary care and family medicine, dental care, women's health and OB-GYN services, behavioral and mental health treatment, pediatrics, podiatry, optometry, adult day health care, substance use treatment, sexual health services, HIV care and prevention, Hepatitis C treatment, nutrition services, and urgent care. They provide both in-office and telemedicine appointment options across their 50 locations. The organization accepts most private and public insurance plans including Medicare, Medicaid, and Child Health Plus, and offers insurance counseling to help patients select appropriate coverage.

What distinguishes Sun River Health is their explicit commitment to providing care regardless of patients' ability to pay. For uninsured individuals, they require proof of income and establish affordable payment plans rather than denying care. They emphasize team-oriented, coordinated care and offer multilingual services (English and Spanish). Their widespread network of 50 locations provides geographic accessibility across three major regions of New York State. Patient testimonials highlight short wait times and respectful treatment.

It should be noted that Sun River Health is a healthcare provider, not a financial services company, and therefore does not belong in any consumer finance category. The current categorization as "free-help" is incorrect. While they do provide financial assistance for healthcare costs through payment plans and sliding-scale fees, this is incidental to their core function as a medical provider. Consumers should contact Sun River Health for healthcare needs and financial assistance with medical bills, not for credit counseling or personal finance solutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Accepts patients regardless of ability to pay with income-based payment plans and sliding-scale fees
50 locations across Hudson Valley, NYC, and Long Island provide geographic accessibility
Comprehensive service offerings including primary care, dental, behavioral health, urgent care, and specialty services
Accepts most major insurance plans (Medicare, Medicaid, Child Health Plus) plus private insurance
Offers telemedicine appointments in addition to in-office visits
Provides insurance counseling to help patients choose appropriate coverage
Multilingual services available in English and Spanish
cons: Not a financial services provider—miscategorized in consumer finance database despite being a healthcare organization
Limited to geographic service areas (Hudson Valley, NYC, Long Island only—New York state only)
Website does not clearly specify exact sliding-scale fee structures or income thresholds for payment assistance
best_for: Uninsured or underinsured individuals needing primary care or dental services in New York
Patients seeking behavioral health, mental health, or substance use treatment services
Individuals requiring specialized care (women's health, pediatrics, LGBTQ+ health, HIV/Hepatitis C treatment)
diagnosis: Sun River Health is a community health center, not a consumer finance company. It is best for uninsured or underinsured New York residents needing affordable healthcare with flexible payment options. The critical caveat is that this organization should not be listed in a consumer finance database—it provides medical services, not financial products or credit counseling.
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
